sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39423" key="e)piqematismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιθεμ-ᾰτισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> Lat. <sense id="n39423.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">augmentum</tr_>, ib.</sense> </entryFree>
